name: Dogmatikamatrix
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>凶導の聖告</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドラグマトリックス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is activated: You can add 1 "Dogmatika" Ritual Monster or 1 "Dogmatika" Ritual Spell from your Deck to your hand, then if your opponent controls a monster, you can add 1 "Dogmatika" card from your Deck to your hand. Once per turn, if you control a "Dogmatika" Ritual Monster: You can look at either player's Extra Deck, and send 1 monster from it to the GY. You can only activate 1 "Dogmatikamatrix" per turn.
eff: When this card is activated: You can add 1 "Dogmatika" Ritual Monster or 1 "Dogmatika" Ritual Spell from your Deck to your hand, then if your opponent controls a monster, you can add 1 "Dogmatika" card from your Deck to your hand. Once per turn, if you control a "Dogmatika" Ritual Monster: You can look at either player's Extra Deck, and send 1 monster from it to the GY. You can only activate 1 "Dogmatikamatrix" per turn.

action: Sends from your Extra Deck to your Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's Extra Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
